name: DebugBear
description: DebugBear — Web performance monitoring tool tracking Lighthouse scores and Core Web Vitals over time.

seo.title: DebugBear — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: DebugBear: DebugBear — Web performance monitoring tool tracking Lighthouse scores and Core Web Vitals over time.

when_to_use: Continuous Lighthouse monitoring for regression detection
Core Web Vitals tracking tied to specific deploys and commits
Performance budget alerting for frontend engineering workflows
Before/after performance comparison for design changes
Tracking LCP, CLS, INP improvements over weeks and months

pros: Per-commit regression tracking with detailed waterfalls
cons: No real user monitoring, synthetic only
review.verdict: Focused synthetic perf testing tool with great regression analysis, pair with RUM for a complete picture.
review.best_for: Engineering teams catching perf regressions in CI with Lighthouse
review.not_for: Teams needing real user monitoring or executive-grade perf dashboards
